global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a food delivery app interface and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with late-night deals.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Food delivery interface
elements.description: A simplified representation of a food delivery app interface with three empty slots for food items.

elements.label: Food delivery interface
elements.description: Another view of the food delivery app interface, showcasing three empty slots for food items.

elements.label: Food delivery interface
elements.description: A third view of the food delivery app interface, featuring three empty slots for food items.

elements.label: Circular button
elements.description: A small circular button located at the bottom left of the app interface, indicating interactivity.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Late-night deals available'.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late-night deals available

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' displayed in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad, colored white against the purple background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner of the ad, indicating user-generated content.
